name: Lumine Group
confidenceReason: Flawless turnaround ($118.8M profit from $258.9M loss), but multiple expansion to 21.1x EV/EBITDA reduces future torque. Telecom end-market lacks organic growth.
bullCase: A flawless turnaround execution. Lumine acquired mismanaged telecom software assets at rock-bottom multiples and drove immediate cash flow accretion, swinging from a massive loss to a $118.8M profit.
bearCase: Success breeds valuation risk. At 21.1x EV/EBITDA, the multiple has expanded, mathematically reducing future torque. The telecom end-market lacks the organic growth tailwinds of broader enterprise software.

cagrModel.basis: non-IFRS FCFA2S per share; CAD; Price-to-FCF exit multiple

description: Lumine Group Inc. develops, installs, and customizes software, and related professional and support services worldwide.
